/usr/bin/ar qc libeni_framework.a  CMakeFiles/eni_framework.dir/src/provider_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/eni_framework.dir/src/stream_bus.c.o CMakeFiles/eni_framework.dir/src/router.c.o CMakeFiles/eni_framework.dir/src/orchestrator.c.o CMakeFiles/eni_framework.dir/src/connectors.c.o CMakeFiles/eni_framework.dir/src/observability.c.o CMakeFiles/eni_framework.dir/src/service.c.o CMakeFiles/eni_framework.dir/src/health.c.o CMakeFiles/eni_framework.dir/src/signal_processor.c.o CMakeFiles/eni_framework.dir/src/decoder.c.o CMakeFiles/eni_framework.dir/src/feedback.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libeni_framework.a
